title: The Last Possible Evangelion Item is Now on Sale
display_title: The Last Possible Evangelion Item is Now on Sale
wikitext:
[]: The Last Possible Evangelion Item is Now on Sale             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Apr 28, 2009 11:02 pm Apartments .

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Apr 28, 2009 11:08 pm I could be wrong, but this is either a publicity stunt for Eva 2.0 or someone (either Anno-sensei or a counterfeiter) is looking to make some ¥en off of Eva

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Tue Apr 28, 2009 11:24 pm Oh, this definitely isn't authorized. But is Shinji really saying "I mustn't run away... from this great deal!" in one of those ads?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Apr 29, 2009 1:15 am the fact that he looks like double facepalming made me laugh

[]: Re: The Last Possible Evangelion Item is Now on Sale             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Apr 29, 2009 1:41 am Until we get the official Rei realdoll, I don't think we can make the claim that the last possible Evangelion iItem is now on sale

[]: Re: The Last Possible Evangelion Item is Now on Sale             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Apr 29, 2009 2:44 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Until we get the official Rei realdoll, I don't think we can make the claim that the last possible Evangelion iItem is now on sale

[]:             Quote Post by PuppetChaos » Wed Apr 29, 2009 3:56 pm drinian wrote: But is Shinji really saying "I mustn't run away... from this great deal!" in one of those ads?

[]: Re: The Last Possible Evangelion Item is Now on Sale             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Apr 29, 2009 9:01 pm @PuppetChaos it is super great, no question Mr. Tines wrote: Until we get the official Rei realdoll, I don't think we can make the claim that the last possible Evangelion item is now on sale

[]:             Quote Post by PuppetChaos » Wed Apr 29, 2009 9:50 pm Now I just have this unshakable image of Gendo as a used car salesman.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Thu Apr 30, 2009 8:46 am PuppetChaos wrote: Now I just have this unshakable image of Gendo as a used car salesman.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed May 06, 2009 12:01 pm PuppetChaos wrote: Now I just have this unshakable image of Gendo as a used car salesman.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sat May 09, 2009 9:38 pm I thought this would be the last possible piece of Evangelion merch, unless I've simply been looking in the wrong places...

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Tue May 12, 2009 6:20 pm PuppetChaos wrote: Now I just have this unshakable image of Gendo as a used car salesman.

[]:             Quote Post by Apathetic Piggy » Tue May 19, 2009 5:42 am drinian wrote: But is Shinji really saying "I mustn't run away... from this great deal!" in one of those ads?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangerion » Wed May 20, 2009 5:18 pm I once saw an apartment building on sitting on some hill in Pittsburgh. It looked nearly identical to the one Misato lived in, if that's any bit relevant to the thread. >> It'd be understandable if sponsors used EVA to advertise something, but this might be a little too much...

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Wed May 27, 2009 2:41 am Evangerion wrote: I once saw an apartment building on sitting on some hill in Pittsburgh. It looked nearly identical to the one Misato lived in, if that's any bit relevant to the thread. >> It'd be understandable if sponsors used EVA to advertise something, but this might be a little too much...
